creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 217824
[patch] add back help for --authormapsuffix

(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #51)
The help info for 'hg help --authormapsuffix' (if FREEBSD option is on) got dropped between attachment 214593 and attachment 215296.  I assume this was accidental - it was probably somewhat hard for users to track the thread of patches for this long lived PR.  Patch attached.
